101 EXTENSIONS
↗ portfolio↗ github
A directory of Chrome tools.  — PRATEEK1771 · 2025 —
NO.NAMEFUNCTIONCATEGORY
01ClarifyChat with any webpageAI Chat+

Select any text and open a Claude-powered conversation. Built for reading comprehension, research, and quick lookups without leaving the tab.

↗ VIEW ON GITHUB
02CloakExtract design assetsDesign Dev+

Extract fonts, color palettes, SVGs, and image assets from any site. Inspect and download in one click — a designer's recon tool.

↗ VIEW ON GITHUB
03DivinaGolden ratio & AI scoringDesign AI+

Overlay golden ratio guides on any page and score the layout with AI. See whether compositions align with classical design proportions.

↗ VIEW ON GITHUB
04ConsistencyHabit heatmap & streaksProductivity+

Track a daily habit with a GitHub-style contribution heatmap. Streaks, completion rings, and calendar heat — all local, all private.

↗ VIEW ON GITHUB
05Dev Dark ModeCode-aware dark modeUX Dev+

Applies a code-aware dark theme that respects syntax highlighting and avoids inverting screenshots, diagrams, or canvas elements.

↗ VIEW ON GITHUB
06Purchase ValidatorAI impulse-buy guardAI Ecommerce+

Before checkout, justify the purchase in writing. AI evaluates your reasoning and flags impulse decisions before money leaves your account.

↗ VIEW ON GITHUB
07Virtual Try-OnTry clothing via photoAI Ecommerce+

Upload a photo and use AI to layer clothing items on your actual body. See how garments fit before committing to a purchase.

↗ VIEW ON GITHUB
08WebRoastAI roasts your siteAI Fun+

Paste a URL and receive a brutally honest AI critique of the site's design, copy, and UX. Good for a laugh; better for a redesign.

↗ VIEW ON GITHUB
PAGE 01 OF 01
101 Extensions  ·  Built by Prateek1771  ·  Open Source
